narrative:
North Olmsted-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 192 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.6 percentage points.
